javascript.instructions: Use ES Modules (import/export), prefer const/let over var, use camelCase for variables/functions and PascalCase for classes, handle errors gracefully with standardized error codes, use optional chaining and nullish coalescing where appropriate, prefer async/await over raw promises

service-handler.instructions: Export default async function receiving pattern match object, return standardized response with urls/filename or {error: 'code'}, use Cookie class for session management, updateCookie() after fetch requests, check for content policies (BLOCK, SNIP), respect duration limits, return specific error codes (fetch.fail, fetch.empty, content.too_long, content.region, content.post.unavailable), include fileMetadata and cover for audio tracks

api-core.instructions: Express.js patterns, use env.js for environment management, implement proper error middleware, use standardized logging via console-text.js

svelte-components.instructions: Svelte 5 runes mode ($state, $derived, $effect), use TypeScript for props, follow component naming PascalCase, use $components alias for imports

svelte-routes.instructions: SvelteKit routing patterns, use +page.svelte and +layout.svelte naming, implement proper load functions in +page.ts, use $lib alias for utilities

security.instructions: Never expose secrets, use JWT for tokens, implement rate limiting, validate all inputs with zod, use timing-safe comparisons for secrets
